dispute_resolution.title: Dispute Resolution
dispute_resolution.content: According to § 36 VSBG we would like to point out that we do not participate on a dispute resolution at a consumer arbitration board and that we are also not legally obligated to do this.

hint.title: Short hint
hint.content: This imprint is provided in accordance with German law. If you have any questions regarding the legal notice or data protection, feel free to contact us via the contact options listed below.
